description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a snow crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a reddish-brown coloration and a rough, textured surface. The crab has ten long, slender legs, including two prominent front claws (chelae) that are slightly curved and pointed. The legs are segmented and taper to fine tips, with a lighter, almost cream color on the undersides. The eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and small antennae are visible near the eyes. The overall appearance is naturalistic, with detailed articulation of joints and subtle color gradations across the shell and limbs.
description: A reddish-brown snow crab with a domed carapace, long slender legs, and two prominent front claws. The surface is rough and textured, with visible eyes on short stalks and small antennae.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's broad carapace, both claws extended outward, and eyes on short stalks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and segmentation of the legs, with one claw and the lateral profile of the carapace visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full spread of all ten legs and the textured, slightly domed back of the carapace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other side's leg arrangement and the crab's lateral body profile.
